description: Style NoteLooking to combine the ethnic look with contemporary styling in your outfit? This piece from mumbai slang are just what you need to give your casual wear the comfort quotient. Wear this with co-ordinated jeans and carry a stylish tote to finish off your outfit. Product DetailsGrey printed kurti with a spread collar, half buttoned ruffled placket, has short puff sleeves. elastication at the midriff, two pockets in the front below the hem and a curved hem Material and Care Blended cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
